name: Light It Up - ninja Jump Up
description: Light it Up Game is beautifully designed and made with love! Swing, jump, flip and slide your stickman body from one neon color shape to another to make them glow and Light It Up - ninja Jump Up. Light It Up Features: - several levels - High graphics - multiple effects - best pastime - Hyper Casual Game Jump, flip & brighten the world in the awesomest of all stickman jumping games.
